caption: Narendra Modi stands behind a wooden podium, delivering a speech against a backdrop of a textured, dark green marble wall with geometric recessed patterns. He is dressed in a light-colored, long-sleeved traditional Indian outfit consisting of a kurta and a Nehru jacket. Two microphones are mounted on the podium in front of him. In the initial sequence, he speaks with a focused expression, his hands resting on the sides of the podium. As the scene progresses, he continues to speak, shifting his posture slightly. In the final sequence, he raises his right hand, extending his index finger upward to emphasize a point while continuing to address the audience. The setting remains static throughout the clip, with the lighting and background remaining consistent as he gestures.
